steps.title: Separate complete sentences
steps.content: The clause before the blank is a complete sentence about Many Farms Chapter. The clause after the blank is another complete sentence about the chapter's Navajo name.

steps.title: Avoid faulty joins
steps.content: A creates a comma splice, C joins the clauses with and but no needed comma, and D runs the clauses together without proper punctuation. The matching choice separates the complete sentences with a period. The answer is B.
